title: CI-REVIEW-001 findings
description: Structured output contract for the independent claude -p code review in CI. Schema-validated - no prose parsing. Blocking policy is staged: report-only first, then blocking ONLY on severity=high findings that cite a specific build-discipline gate section (explicit criteria, not vibes; any category false-positiving >20% gets disabled).

category.description: Kebab-case finding class (e.g. bulk-write, s3-template, silent-swallow, secret-exposure, spine-mutex, cron-path). Categories are the unit of false-positive tracking: >20% FP rate disables the category.

gate_section.description: The specific build-discipline gate violated (e.g. 's11', 's36', 's41', 's44'). REQUIRED non-null for a finding to ever block; null = advisory only.

failure_scenario.description: Concrete inputs/state -> wrong output/loss. A finding without a failure scenario is an opinion.
